svg.title: PMO system functional diagram
svg.desc: Data-flow style functional diagram showing PMO functions, named data flows between them, and three data stores: Vector DB, Neo4j Graph DB, and Metastore.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data entities does Azure DevOps expose to the PMO system?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of cost and FTE questions does a PMO user ask?')
sendPrompt('What authentication and field mapping happens during PMO data extraction?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch scheduler trigger the pipeline — cron, event, manual?')
sendPrompt('What normalisation, deduplication and embedding happens during transform?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent parse a natural language PMO query into structured intent?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent decide which stores to query and how does it merge results?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent decide whether to return a chart, table, or text answer?')
